auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Uniswap Trading API key sent with the x-api-key header. Create or manage it from the official Uniswap developer portal for the Trading API.

actions.name: check_approval
actions.description: Check whether the swapper wallet needs an ERC-20 approval transaction before swapping.

walletAddress.description: The wallet address that would send the token.

token.description: The token contract address to approve.

amount.description: The token amount that must be spendable.

chainId.description: The blockchain chain ID supported by the Uniswap Trading API.

maxPriorityFeePerGas.description: The maximum priority fee per gas in wei.

maxFeePerGas.description: The maximum total fee per gas in wei.

gasLimit.description: The replacement gas limit cap in gas units.

overrides.description: Optional gas caps applied on top of the selected urgency tier.

oneOf.description: An urgency level with optional gas caps.

urgency.description: The urgency mode used for approval or swap pricing.

includeGasInfo.description: Whether the gas-fee fields should be requested from Uniswap.

tokenOut.description: The output token address when provided for routing context.

tokenOutChainId.description: The blockchain chain ID supported by the Uniswap Trading API.

enablePermit2.description: Whether Permit2 should stay enabled. Set false to send x-permit2-disabled: true.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for checking whether a wallet approval transaction is required.

chainId.description: The blockchain chain ID supported by the Uniswap Trading API.

anyOf.description: The gas limit returned by Uniswap when present.
The max fee per gas returned by Uniswap when present.
The max priority fee per gas returned by Uniswap when present.
The gas price returned by Uniswap when present.
One transaction request returned by Uniswap.

chainId.description: The blockchain chain ID supported by the Uniswap Trading API.

anyOf.description: The gas limit returned by Uniswap when present.
The max fee per gas returned by Uniswap when present.
The max priority fee per gas returned by Uniswap when present.
The gas price returned by Uniswap when present.
One transaction request returned by Uniswap.
The estimated gas cost for the approval transaction.
The estimated gas cost for the approval-reset transaction.

actions.name: create_swap
actions.description: Create the transaction calldata for a Uniswap swap from a prior quote and optional permit signature.

quote.description: The prior Uniswap quote object to convert into swap calldata.

signature.description: The signed Permit2 signature when one is required.

domain.description: The EIP-712 domain object returned by Uniswap.

values.description: The permit values object returned by Uniswap.

types.description: The permit type map returned by Uniswap.

permitData.description: The Permit2 payload returned by Uniswap when applicable.

refreshGasPrice.description: Whether Uniswap should refresh gas pricing.

simulateTransaction.description: Whether Uniswap should simulate the transaction.

safetyMode.description: The swap safety mode accepted by the /swap endpoint.

deadline.description: The swap deadline timestamp in seconds.

maxPriorityFeePerGas.description: The maximum priority fee per gas in wei.

maxFeePerGas.description: The maximum total fee per gas in wei.

gasLimit.description: The replacement gas limit cap in gas units.

overrides.description: Optional gas caps applied on top of the selected urgency tier.

oneOf.description: An urgency level with optional gas caps.

urgency.description: The urgency mode used for approval or swap pricing.

enableUniversalRouter.description: Whether to send the public x-universal-router-version header as version 2.0.

enablePermit2.description: Whether Permit2 should stay enabled. Set false to send x-permit2-disabled: true.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating swap calldata.

chainId.description: The blockchain chain ID supported by the Uniswap Trading API.

anyOf.description: The gas limit returned by Uniswap when present.
The max fee per gas returned by Uniswap when present.
The max priority fee per gas returned by Uniswap when present.
The gas price returned by Uniswap when present.

swap.description: One transaction request returned by Uniswap.

anyOf.description: The estimated gas cost for the swap transaction.

actions.name: get_quote
actions.description: Request a Uniswap trade quote for one wallet, token pair, and amount.

type.description: How Uniswap interprets the requested amount.

amount.description: The input or output amount in token base units.

tokenInChainId.description: The blockchain chain ID supported by the Uniswap Trading API.

tokenOutChainId.description: The blockchain chain ID supported by the Uniswap Trading API.

swapper.description: The wallet address that will submit the transaction.

recipient.description: The wallet address that should receive the output token.

autoSlippage.description: The automatic slippage strategy supported by the public Uniswap API.

routingPreference.description: The quote routing preference for Uniswap route selection.

protocols.description: The protocols Uniswap may use for routing.

maxPriorityFeePerGas.description: The maximum priority fee per gas in wei.

maxFeePerGas.description: The maximum total fee per gas in wei.

gasLimit.description: The replacement gas limit cap in gas units.

overrides.description: Optional gas caps applied on top of the selected urgency tier.

oneOf.description: An urgency level with optional gas caps.

urgency.description: The urgency mode used for approval or swap pricing.

permitAmount.description: The permit allowance mode included in a quote response when Permit2 is enabled.

spreadOptimization.description: The UniswapX spread optimization strategy when applicable.

generatePermitAsTransaction.description: Whether Permit2 should be generated as an onchain transaction instead of a signature.

enableUniversalRouter.description: Whether to send the public x-universal-router-version header as version 2.0.

enablePermit2.description: Whether Permit2 should stay enabled. Set false to send x-permit2-disabled: true.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for requesting a Uniswap trade quote.

routing.description: The routing family returned by Uniswap.

quoteId.description: The quote identifier returned by Uniswap.

chainId.description: The blockchain chain ID supported by the Uniswap Trading API.

swapper.description: The wallet address tied to this quote.

tradeType.description: How Uniswap interprets the requested amount.

inputAmount.description: The quoted input amount in base units.

outputAmount.description: The quoted output amount in base units.

anyOf.description: The output recipient when Uniswap returns one.
The quoted slippage tolerance percentage when returned.
The total estimated gas cost in wei when returned.
The total estimated gas cost denominated in USDC.
The gas use estimate when returned.

items.description: One transaction simulation failure reason returned by Uniswap.

txFailureReasons.description: Transaction simulation failure reasons returned by Uniswap.

domain.description: The EIP-712 domain object returned by Uniswap.

values.description: The permit values object returned by Uniswap.

types.description: The permit type map returned by Uniswap.

anyOf.description: The Permit2 payload returned by Uniswap when applicable.

route.description: The route legs returned by Uniswap as a nested list of raw route segments.

rawQuote.description: The raw quote object returned by Uniswap.
